creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #3)

I should have noticed and reported that the web page
that I referenced (looking up 12's) does say:

HISTORY
     An	arch manual page appeared in FreeBSD 12.

FreeBSD	11.1			 May 16, 2017			  FreeBSD 11.1

which would indicate that for:

	   pc98		      2.2		    11.x

pc98 should still be covered but is not.
